zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas de Leigh於1395年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾阿德林頓時，他的父親John Leigh45歲，母親Agnes Wilshire40歲。他和Emily Parker至少有1個兒子。他去世於1439年在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾巴金哈姆享年44歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Leigh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places (in at least sixteen counties, but especially Leigh in Lancashire) named either with the nominative case of Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’ (see Lee ) or with lēage, a late dative form of this word (see Lye ).
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 李, based on its Cantonese pronunciation. See   Li   1.

variants.name: Leah
meanings: Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 李 and 利, see   Li   1 and 3.

variants.name: Lee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sang, Jae, Jong, Jung, Sung, Yong, Kyung, Seung, Dong, Kwang, Myung.

English: topographic name for someone who lived near a meadow or a patch of arable land, Middle English lee, lea, from Old English lēa, dative case (used after a preposition) of lēah, which originally meant ‘wood or glade’.

English: habitational name from any of the many places in England named with Old English lēah ‘wood, glade’, including Lee in Buckinghamshire, Essex, Hampshire, Kent, and Shropshire, and Lea in Cheshire, Derbyshire, Herefordshire, Lancashire, Lincolnshire, and Wiltshire.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas de Leigh was born in 1395, in Adlington, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Leigh, was 45 and his mother, Agnes Wilshire, was 40. He had at least 1 son with Emily Parker. He died in 1439, in Buckingham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas de Leigh est né en 1395, à Adlington, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Leigh, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Agnes Wilshire, avait 40 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Emily Parker. Il est décédé en 1439, à Buckingham, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas de Leigh 1395 in Adlington, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Leigh 45 und seine Mutter Agnes Wilshire 40. Er hatte mit Emily Parker mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1439 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Buckingham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Leigh è nato il nel 1395 nel Adlington, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Leigh, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Wilshire, aveva 40 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Emily Parker. Morì nel 1439, nel Buckingham, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas de Leighが1395年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアアドリントンで生まれた時，父John Leighは45歳，母Agnes Wilshireは40歳であった。彼はEmily Parkerとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1439年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアブクインガムで44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de Leigh(이)가 1395년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 애들링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Leigh(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Wilshire(은)는 40세였다. 그는 Emily Parker(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1439년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 벅잉함에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas de Leigh родился в 1395 г. в местности адлингтон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Leigh было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Wilshire, 40. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Emily Parker. Он умер в 1439 г. в местности буккингхам, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 44 лет.
